/docs/docs/features/module-loading.description: How sandboxed code resolves and loads modules.

/docs/docs/features/output-capture.description: Capture console output from sandboxed code.

/docs/docs/features/resource-limits.description: Secure Exec resource limits, defaults, backpressure constants, and warning names.

/docs/docs/features/typescript.description: Compiling and type-checking TypeScript inside the sandbox.

/docs/docs/sdks/rust.description: Install the Secure Exec Rust client and find its generated docs.rs reference.

/docs/docs/use-cases/ai-agent-code-exec.title: AI Agent Code Exec
/docs/docs/use-cases/ai-agent-code-exec.description: Give AI agents a secure code-execution tool that runs untrusted code in a sandbox and returns structured results.

/docs/docs/use-cases/code-mode.title: Code Mode (MCP)
/docs/docs/use-cases/code-mode.description: Give AI agents a single code-execution tool instead of individual MCP tools. The LLM writes code that chains binding calls, executed safely in Secure Exec.

/docs/docs/use-cases/dev-servers.title: Dev Servers
/docs/docs/use-cases/dev-servers.description: Run user-provided server-style code (HTTP servers, request handlers) inside a secure isolate.

/docs/docs/use-cases/plugin-systems.title: Plugin Systems
/docs/docs/use-cases/plugin-systems.description: Run user-authored plugins in isolation with explicit permissions.
